ops.title: Onboard cc-skills' own AGENTS.md to the cc-guides render pipeline
ops.description: cc-skills/AGENTS.md carries a stale canonical stamp pointing at the retired plugins/repo-bootstrap/_partials/ccx.md and its ccx table predates the web ops / grep flags / locate-dual-rows era; only the ship line was hand-patched (9d162c48). cc-skills is not in fleet.json and has no .claude/fragments layout — add one (importing its own guides) or add the repo to the fleet so renders keep it current.

ops.text: cc-skills AGENTS.md ccx table matches the current guides/md/ccx.md content and is regenerated by the render pipeline, not by hand
